description_long: This is a compact, wall-mounted ornamental fountain with a classical arched back and two-tiered water basins. The upper basin is circular and set within a decorative arch, from which water flows through a spout into the lower, larger basin. The back panel features a geometric tile pattern in blue and white, adding a Mediterranean or Spanish Revival aesthetic. A small cluster of green leaves or vines is attached to one side, providing a touch of natural embellishment. The fountain is primarily constructed from a smooth, light-colored stone or plaster material, with water visibly pooling and cascading between the basins. The overall design is elegant and suitable for urban parks, courtyards, or plazas.
description: A decorative, arched wall fountain with two basins, blue patterned tiles, and a leafy accent, featuring flowing water between tiers. The structure is made of light stone or plaster and exudes a Mediterranean charm.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the arched back, patterned tile, both basins, flowing water, and leafy ornament on the right.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the plain, curved back of the fountain and the leafy accent protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the unadorned back and side of the fountain, with minimal visibility of the basins or water.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the arched facade, both basins, water flow, and partial leafy ornamentation.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a geometric blue and white tile pattern on the back panel and a small cluster of stylized green leaves or vines on one side, adding decorative and naturalistic touches. The arched structure and column details evoke a classical or Mediterranean style.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain has a two-tiered basin system: a small, circular upper basin and a larger, semi-oval lower basin with a raised rim. The basins are integrated into the arched structure, with water flowing from the upper to the lower tier.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: A single, steady stream of water flows from the upper spout into the lower basin, creating a gentle cascade effect without multiple jets or elaborate spray patterns.
